The JSON output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/ev_fleet_pv_analysis.json. The expected annual load is exactly 262,800 kWh (12 hrs @ 10kW + 12 hrs @ 50kW = 720 kWh/day * 365).
